title: populus nigra var. neapolitana
intro: Populus nigra var. neapolitana, also known as the Black Poplar or Italian Black Poplar, is a variety of the Black Poplar tree, native to the Mediterranean region. This tree has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The bark and leaves of the Populus nigra var. neapolitana have been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin conditions, providing health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, making it a valuable resource in traditional herbal medicine.
